body: Suresh bhai, corporate thali package ke liye ek solid structure ready kar diya hai: Min 20 boxes, Lunch Thali @ ₹149/box, delivery included for orders above ₹3,000. Pick-up discount bhi de sakte ho — ₹129/box. Office canteens and IT parks in Indiranagar are the best targets (your 42% repeat rate shows people love the food). Want me to draft a GBP post + a WhatsApp message you can forward to nearby offices?
rationale: Merchant explicitly asked what it would look like — no more qualifying needed. Concrete package structure with prices, target segment named (Indiranagar IT parks), effort externalized.

body: Kids summer camp update: here's the draft — *Zen Kids Yoga Camp* | Age 7-12 | 4 weeks | 3 sessions/week | ₹2,499 (trial @ ₹499 for first week). Your trial-to-paid rate is 55% — already 2× industry. Want me to publish the GBP post + Insta carousel today?
rationale: Merchant explicitly asked about the program — moving straight to action with a ready draft. Own conversion stats (55% trial-to-paid) used as social proof.

body: Hi Aditya, Karim's Salon yahan se — kal aapki appointment confirm hai. Koi bhi special service add karni ho (head massage FREE hai haircut ke saath) toh reply kar dena. See you tomorrow! 💈
rationale: Appointment reminder to lapsed-hard customer; friendly tone, mentions a free add-on to encourage engagement, uses Hindi as per language preference.

body: Hi Riya, Beauty Lounge by Renu ki taraf se — kal aapki appointment hai 😊 Kuch special add karna ho toh batao. Milte hain kal!
rationale: Simple appointment confirmation for an active Hindi-speaking customer. Warm, brief, no hard CTA needed.

body: Summer shelf update, Apollo: ORS demand +40%, sunscreen +38%, antifungal +45% vs last month — cold/cough down 60%. Worth stocking up on these 3 before the peak. Your 68% repeat rate means existing customers will ask first. Want me to draft a customer WhatsApp nudge for ORS + sunscreen?
rationale: External seasonal trigger with precise demand data from payload. Merchant's own repeat-rate used as anchor. Effort externalized (customer message already offered).

body: Dr. Meera, IDA is running a free CDE webinar this week — 2 credits, no fee for members. Topic aligns with your high-risk-adult cohort (fluoride recall protocols). Worth 90 min. Want me to add it to your calendar + draft a patient-ed post based on the content?
rationale: CDE opportunity with concrete value (2 credits, free). Clinical relevance to her existing cohort. Effort externalized — calendar + post offered.

body: Namaste Mr. Sharma! Apollo Pharmacy se Vera bol rahi hoon 🙏 Aapki teeno dawaiyan — metformin, atorvastatin, telmisartan — 28 April ko khatam hongi. Aapka delivery address save hai. Subah ki delivery chahiye? Reply 1 for YES (same address), 2 for pickup.
rationale: Chronic refill reminder with exact date, molecule list, and morning delivery preference honored. Simple numbered choice for elderly customer.

body: Hi Vivaan, Bright Smile Dental here — your routine dental check is due soon. Dr. Sameer has slots available this week. Dental Cleaning @ ₹299 + Free Consultation for returning patients. Want me to block a slot for you?
rationale: Recall nudge for a new patient (5 visits). Pricing anchored to catalog. Effort externalized via slot-blocking offer.

body: Dr. Meera, FYI — Smile Studio opened 1.3km away in Lajpat Nagar on April 8. Their listed offer: Dental Cleaning @ ₹199. Your cleaning is ₹299, but your 540 YTD patients and 4+ year track record are the real moat. Two quick moves that help: revive your stale posts (22 days old) and reactivate Deep Cleaning @ ₹499 as a contrast offer. Want me to do both today?
rationale: Uses actual competitor data from payload. Loss-aversion framing (don't lose ground). Concrete actions proposed (posts + offer). Effort externalized.

body: Suresh bhai, just a heads up — a new South Indian place has opened nearby in Indiranagar. Your 12,400 views/month and 42% repeat rate are strong, but now's a good time to remind regulars you're here. Want me to post a 'local favourite since 2014' GBP update + push your ₹149 thali offer as a Google post?
rationale: Competitor trigger. Uses merchant's actual numbers to frame strength (12,400 views, 42% repeat, est. 2014). Concrete action proposed.

body: Ek quick question, Studio11 — is mein tumhara kya kehna hai: is hafte kaunsi service sabse zyada book ho rahi hai? Bridal trial ya regular haircuts? (Pichle data mein bridal searches in Kapra +28% dikhe the.) Batao — uss pe ek targeted GBP post ready kar deta hoon.
rationale: Curiosity ask using the merchant's own vertical trend (+28% bridal). Asking the merchant — a compulsion lever production Vera underuses. Offers to act on their answer.

body: Suresh bhai, quick question: which item gets the most repeat orders from office-goers — the ₹149 thali or something else? Asking because your 42% repeat rate is above metro average (18%) and I want to build the corporate package around the right anchor dish. One reply and I'll have the draft ready.
rationale: Curious-ask trigger. Uses merchant's own repeat rate vs peer avg (42% vs 18%) as hook. One-question ask with clear payoff stated.

body: Hi Rashmi, PowerHouse se — it's been 57 days since your last session. You hit 22 visits over 5 months, which puts you in our top 20% for consistency. We know life gets busy — your weekday evening slot is still open. Come back for 3 FREE trial classes, no re-enrollment fee. YES to book your slot?
rationale: Win-back for lapsed-hard customer. Her own visit history (22 visits, 5 months) used as social proof/reciprocity. Free trial removes friction. Weekday evening preference honored.

body: Hi Reyansh, Dr. Asha's clinic ki taraf se — aapka 6-month dental check due ho gaya hai. Dental Cleaning @ ₹299 mein available hai is hafte. Apna slot book karna ho toh reply karein — preferred time batayein.
rationale: Lapsed patient recall. Clinical tone, clear pricing, open-ended slot ask. Hindi used as per language preference.

body: Hi Reyansh, Daily Care Medicos se — aapki medicines ka refill due lag raha hai. Humari Annual Health Card pe saal bhar 15% discount milta hai (sirf ₹399). Free home delivery bhi available hai ₹499 ke upar. Chahiye toh batao — order ready kar deta hoon.
rationale: Lapsed pharmacy customer re-engagement. Specific health card offer (₹399, 15% year-round) as anchor. Hindi-English mix per language pref.

body: Hi, Glamour Lounge ke liye ek quick note — subscription expire hue 38 din ho gaye hain, profile maintenance paused hai. Aapke 1,200 monthly views abhi bhi aa rahe hain, lekin bina active offer ke 78% log page chhod dete hain without calling. 10 min mein profile live ho sakta hai. Wapas shuru karein? Reply YES.
rationale: Dormant + expired subscription. Loss-aversion hook (78% page abandonment without offer). Specific views number. Minimal ask (10 min). Binary YES.

body: Chai Point, Sector 8 — noticed we haven't connected in a while. Quick one: your 2,189 monthly views are on par with the peer median for Chandigarh cafes, but you have zero active offers right now. A simple 'Weekday Chai + Snack Combo @ ₹79' post could pull 15-20% more walk-ins this week. Want me to draft it?
rationale: Dormant merchant re-engagement. Their own views cited, no-offer gap identified. Concrete offer format proposed (₹79 combo). Effort externalized.

body: Studio11 — Diwali is 188 days away, which sounds far, but the smart salons in Hyderabad are locking in their bridal package pricing now before material costs rise. Your Hair Spa @ ₹499 + Haircut @ ₹99 are strong anchors. Want me to draft a 'Diwali Glam Package' post + a pre-booking offer for your 220 lapsed customers?
rationale: Festival trigger with specific day count. Social proof (smart salons booking now). Loss-aversion (material costs). Effort externalized with clear audience size (220 lapsed).

body: Bend & Burn — Navratri and Diwali are coming up, and gyms in Koramangala typically see a 20-25% membership surge in Oct-Nov. Your trial-to-paid rate is currently below the Bangalore peer avg of 32%. Now's the right time to set up a 'Festive Kickstart' package — First Month @ ₹499 with 3 free classes. Want me to draft the GBP post + member push?
rationale: Festival + seasonal peak framing. Peer benchmark used to show gap. Specific offer anchored to catalog price. Clear action.

body: Sunrise Medicos — your Google profile is unverified. Verified profiles get on average 30% more views from patients searching nearby. Verification takes one postcard or a phone call from Google — 5 minutes. Want me to walk you through the steps right now?
rationale: GBP unverified trigger. Specific uplift % from payload. Clear effort size (5 min). Effort externalized.

body: DC vs MI aaj raat 7:30 baje Arun Jaitley Stadium mein — Delhi mein match night delivery orders typically spike 35-40% vs regular Saturdays. Aapka BOGO pizza offer (Tue-Thu only) is currently locked out. Ek time-limited 'Match Night Special' — Buy 1 Get 1 Half OFF for tonight only — enable karo? Ready in 2 min.
rationale: Live IPL match trigger. Specific match and time. Data-backed delivery spike framing. Current BOGO limitation identified. Urgency (tonight only). 2-min effort.

body: Suresh bhai — 5 reviews aur aur aap 150 reviews milestone cross kar lete ho. 150 reviews Google ranking mein ek measurable jump deta hai (typically +15% visibility). Yeh milestone uss week mein aata hai jab aapki IPL traffic bhi peak pe hai. Chahiye toh ek 'Leave a review, get a free raita' push send kar deta hoon aapke last-30d customers ko?
rationale: Milestone imminent (5 away). Specific visibility uplift cited. Timing leverage (IPL week). Concrete incentive proposed (free raita). Effort externalized.

body: Pizza Spot, Aundh — milestone aane wala hai! Aapke customers already love the food (CTR 5.3%, well above peer avg 2.5%). Milestone cross hone pe ek 'Thank you Pune' Google post + a limited-time offer can convert that goodwill into more reviews. Ready kar dun?
rationale: Milestone trigger. Merchant's own CTR (5.3%) vs peer (2.5%) cited as social proof. Effort externalized.

body: Dr. Bharat, calls dropped 50% this week — from a baseline of 12/week to just 4. Three overlapping issues: unverified GBP, no active offers, and subscription expires in 12 days. The fastest fix is reactivating 'Dental Cleaning @ ₹299' + one GBP post — typically recovers 40-60% of call volume within 7 days. Subscription renewal ke saath main yeh dono kal tak live kar sakta hoon. Chalega?
rationale: Severe perf dip + renewal urgency combined. Specific numbers throughout (50% drop, 12 days, 40-60% recovery). Three root causes identified. Clear single action proposed.

body: The Beauty Bar, Baner — your subscription has expired and profile maintenance has paused. Your CTR is 5.8% (above peer median of 4%), which means when people find you, they call. But without active offers, you're leaving 30-40% of those views unconverted. A Haircut @ ₹99 post takes 5 minutes. Want me to set it up and reactivate your profile?
rationale: Expired sub + perf dip context. Merchant's own strong CTR (5.8% vs 4% peer) reframed as an asset being wasted. Effort is tiny (5 min). Loss-aversion.

body: Calls up 15% this week at Zen Yoga — looks like the kids yoga post is working (baseline was 18 calls/week, now trending higher). Strike while the hot: want me to convert those extra inquiries into bookings? I can draft a 'Limited Spots — Kids Summer Camp' follow-up WhatsApp you can send to the leads who called but didn't sign up.
rationale: Perf spike trigger with identified driver (kids yoga post). Uses actual baseline (18 calls). Logical next step — convert spike to bookings. Effort externalized.

body: Sunrise Medicos — views are holding steady this week. Ek observation: aapke 60 chronic prescription customers mein se most abhi manually aate hain. Free home delivery ₹499 pe enable ho jata toh unka reorder rate typically 25% badh jaata hai. Setup sirf 10 minute ka kaam hai. Chalega?
rationale: Perf stable — uses the moment to propose a high-value next step (delivery setup). Specific chronic Rx customer count (60). Data-backed uplift (25% reorder). Easy effort (10 min).

body: Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's clinic here 🦷 It's been 5 months since your last visit — your 6-month cleaning recall is due. Apke liye 2 slots ready hain: Wed 5 Nov, 6pm ya Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. ₹299 cleaning + complimentary fluoride. Reply 1 for Wed, 2 for Thu, ya koi aur time batao.
rationale: Classic recall reminder. Exact slots from payload. Language mix per Priya's hi-en preference. Weekday evening slots match her preference. Catalog price anchored.

body: Hi Diya, Zen Yoga Studio here — hope you're doing well! It's been a while since your last session. We have a 'Back to Mat' offer: First Month @ ₹499 + Free Body Composition Analysis (usually ₹299). Your consistency record here was great — 9 visits. Would love to see you back. Want to book a trial class this week?
rationale: Lapsed member win-back. Her own visit history (9 visits) cited as reciprocity. Specific catalog offer with free add-on. Effort minimal (trial class).

body: Dr. Meera, DCI circular just dropped — radiograph dose limits changing from Dec 15, 2026. Max dose goes from 1.5 to 1.0 mSv per IOPA. E-speed film passes; D-speed does not (per DCI circular 2026-11-04). If you're on D-speed, upgrade needed before Dec 15. Want me to check your current setup against the new limit + draft a patient notice?
rationale: Regulatory compliance trigger. Specific numbers (1.5→1.0 mSv, Dec 15 deadline). Exact circular cited. Practical implication stated (E-speed ok, D-speed not). Effort externalized.
